314 
REV_CNTR_1ST_MSP_PD_AMT 
LABEL: 
Revenue Center 1st Medicare Secondary Payer (MSP) Paid Amount 
DESCRIPTION: The amount paid by the primary payer when the payer is primary to Medicare (Medicare is a 
secondary). 
SHORT NAME: REV_MSP1 
LONG NAME: REV_CNTR_1ST_MSP_PD_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
12 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
XXX.XX 
COMMENT: 
This field is populated for those
